root.name: Change presentation title to the requested text
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully changed the presentation title from 'Texts and Human Experiences The Common Module' to 'Literature and Human Experiences The Common Module', and did not introduce unintended changes.

children.name: Correct title change
children.description: Checks that the presentation's title was changed exactly as requested, and the old title is no longer present.

children.name: Title text matches exactly
children.description: Verifies that the main title of the presentation is now exactly 'Literature and Human Experiences The Common Module'.

children.name: No extraneous changes
children.description: Checks that the agent did not make unrelated changes such as modifying slide content, adding/removing slides, transitions, or animations.

children.name: No slides added or removed
children.description: Verifies that no slides were added or removed except for the title change.

children.name: No unrelated content modifications
children.description: Checks that content (other than the title) was not changed on any slide.

children.name: No animations or transitions changed
children.description: Ensures no animations or transitions (added, removed, or modified) occurred as a result of the title change.

metadata.task: Change the title of the presentation from 'Texts and Human Experiences The Common Module' to 'Literature and Human Experiences The Common Module'
